# Need disaster contracting help route

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

## User intent The user wants to sell to government agencies during or after disasters. ## Best primary route

## When to surface

The user wants to sell to government agencies during or after disasters.

## Key information

- ## User intent
- The user wants to sell to government agencies during or after disasters.
- ## Best primary route
- Route to UH APEX disaster contracting if formed and procurement-ready. If recovering from damage, route to SBDC/SBA.
- ## Ask first
- Are you recovering your own business or selling to disaster-response buyers?
- Are you legally formed and registered?

## People and links

- Organizations: Small Business Development Center (SBDC), APEX Accelerator, University of Houston
- Link: <https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/Disaster_Recovery_Contracting.asp>

## Next handoff

Route to UH APEX disaster contracting if formed and procurement-ready. If recovering from damage, route to SBDC/SBA.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
